title: Singing at KTV 唱KTV
scene: Mia和朋友们在KTV唱歌，互相鼓励点歌。

lines.en: Kate, this KTV room is so cool!
I know! What song do you want to sing first?
Yes! That is a great song. You go first.
I am a little nervous. What if I sing badly?
lines.zh: 我有点紧张。如果我唱得不好怎么办？

lines.en: Do not worry! Just have fun. We are all friends here.
lines.zh: 别担心！开心就好。我们都是朋友。

lines.en: Wow, you sing really well! Can we sing together?
lines.zh: 哇，你唱得真好！我们能一起唱吗？

lines.en: Of course! Let us pick a duet song.
lines.zh: 当然！我们选一首合唱歌曲吧。
